query:
UPDATE deployment_vector_index_states
                SET
                    tracked_row_count = $3,
                    vector_index_created_at = CASE
                        WHEN vector_index_created_at IS NULL AND $4::boolean THEN $5
                        ELSE vector_index_created_at
                    END,
                    updated_at = $5
                WHERE deployment_id = $1 AND store_name = $2
